title: Facets, Calendars, Sessions, Pagination, Search, and Infinite URL Spaces · Behavior Case: Pagination Termination
summary: A finite site generates unbounded filter permutations, dates, tracking IDs, sort orders, empty searches, and repeated pagination paths. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pagination termination increment in URL-space trap detector and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice…
objectives: Stop pagination on semantic end evidence, repeated content identity, next-link cycles, page budget, or contract violation.
Identify session, tracking, nonce, cache-buster, and personalized parameters without deleting unknown keys by guesswork.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-pagination-termination — Stop pagination on semantic end evidence, repeated content identity, next-link cycles, page budget, or contract violation.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-url-traps-infinite-spaces-5
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-url-traps-infinite-spaces-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def worked_scraper_url_traps_infinite_spaces_5(discovered_urls: int = 240, admitted_urls: int = 72, trap_rejections: int = 168, content_identities: int = 60, budget_breaches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorizationworked5",
        "url9036",
        "response5dekrow",
        "treeworked59036",
        "frontier9036worked5",
        "report5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if discovered_urls < 1 or admitted_urls < 0 or trap_rejections < 0:
        return False, discovered_urls, "url-space-count"
    if admitted_urls + trap_rejections != discovered_urls:
        return False, admitted_urls, "trap-reconciliation"
    if content_identities < 1 or content_identities > admitted_urls:
        return False, content_identities, "content-yield"
    if budget_breaches > 0:
        return False, budget_breaches, "budget-breach"
    assert admitted_urls + trap_rejections == discovered_urls
    return True, trap_rejections, "bounded-url-space"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-pagination-termination-d9exkb
# Competency: scraper-pagination-termination.
# Case 6382: an authorized nonprofit content audit.
# Operating constraint: all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget.
def evidence_scraper_pagination_termination_d9exkb(discovered_urls: int = 240, admitted_urls: int = 72, trap_rejections: int = 168, content_identities: int = 60, budget_breaches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_d9exkb = "d9exkb-bkxe9d-6382"
    assert evidence_variant_d9exkb
    evidence_axes_d9exkb = (
        "authorizationd9exkb",
        "url6382",
        "responsebkxe9d",
        "treed9exkb6382",
        "frontier6382d9exkb",
        "reportbkxe9d6382",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_d9exkb)) == 6
    if discovered_urls < 1 or admitted_urls < 0 or trap_rejections < 0:
        return False, discovered_urls, "url-space-count"
    if admitted_urls + trap_rejections != discovered_urls:
        return False, admitted_urls, "trap-reconciliation"
    if content_identities < 1 or content_identities > admitted_urls:
        return False, content_identities, "content-yield"
    if budget_breaches > 0:
        return False, budget_breaches, "budget-breach"
    assert admitted_urls + trap_rejections == discovered_urls
    return True, trap_rejections, "bounded-url-space"
